◎译　　名　无角螺，女巫之舞 / Acera, or the Witches' Dance
◎片　　名　Acéra ou Le bal des sorcières
◎年　　代　1972
◎产　　地　法国

◎导　　演　让·潘勒维 Jean Painlevé

◎简　　介  

　　In mud flats along the coast of Brittany we watch acera, small ball-shaped mollusks that are about two inches in diameter. They rest in mud; then, in water, they dance, their skirt-like hood spreading like a dervish's cassock. They spin and spin. The film adds musical accompaniment. We watch them mate and secrete eggs: acera are both male and female, and can form chains with ot...
